payload.answer: I could not remember takeaways from the article because the fetch failed with a 404/network error. No source claims were available to store.

details: Input requested remembering an article at a malformed/unavailable URL: https -//examplecom/missing

No durable memory cards were created because source content was unavailable.

repair_options: Provide the article text or excerpts directly.
